cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out where Eve is playing at the end of the match after all the swaps. Let me start by writing down the initial positions of each player. Original assignments: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: left winger - Eve: goalkeeper Now, there are several swaps mentioned. Let me go through each one step by step. First swap: Dave and Eve trade positions. So after this, Dave becomes goalkeeper and Eve becomes left winger. Let me note that down: After first swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: center midfielder - Claire: right midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Second swap: Claire and Bob trade positions. So Bob moves to right midfielder and Claire moves to center midfielder. After second swap: - Alice: fullback - Bob: right midfielder - Claire: center midfielder - Dave: goalkeeper - Eve: left winger Third swap: Alice and Bob trade positions. Now Alice becomes right midfielder and Bob becomes fullback. After third swap: - Alice: right midfielder - Bob: fullback
